compiled_state.title: Create single-agent-integrate.md shared prompt
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Create plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/single-agent-integrate.md. Trimmed variant of per-worktree-review-commit.md for single-agent fix-bug/debug-everything Bug-Fix Mode flows. Sequence: (1) verify WORKTREE_PATH!=ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT guard, (2) compute WORKTREE_ARTIFACTS via 'cd "$WORKTREE_PATH" && source ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/lib/deps.sh && get_artifacts_dir', (3) auto-fix pass with cd $WORKTREE_PATH && prefix, (4) diff hash, (5) review tier, (6) dispatch code-reviewer (no isolation:worktree), (7) CONTEXT ANCHOR continuation guard after REVIEW_RESULT, (8) record-review.sh, (9) record-test-status.sh, (10) commit via COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md with cd $WORKTREE_PATH && prefix, (11) harvest from ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT: cd "$ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT" && .claude/scripts/dso harvest-worktree <branch> "$WORKTREE_ARTIFACTS", (12) cleanup from ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT. AC: test-single-agent-integrate-structure.sh all 9 assertions pass GREEN. testing_mode: RED

comments.body: GAP_FINDING: Exact literal strings required in single-agent-integrate.md to pass 1489-4b1d structural tests: (1) step heading pattern, (2) 'dso harvest-worktree' or 'harvest-worktree' (NOT 'harvest-worktree.sh' — use shim form), (3) 'REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md', (4) '[ "$WORKTREE_PATH" =' (bash guard), (5) 'cd $WORKTREE_PATH &&', (6) 'CONTEXT ANCHOR' (exact case), (7) 'ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT', (8) 'WORKTREE_ARTIFACTS', (9) pattern showing WORKTREE_ARTIFACTS computed inside WORKTREE_PATH context. Finding 4: Before implementing, read plugins/dso/docs/contracts/harvest-attestation-format.md and check harvest-worktree.sh argument signature. record-review.sh and record-test-status.sh MUST run from inside WORKTREE_PATH (cd $WORKTREE_PATH &&) so their outputs land in WORKTREE_ARTIFACTS — if they run from ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT the harvest attestation will fail.
comments.author: Test
